task_description: Add auto-detection and parsing of multi-line concatenated values in Form Responses 1 spreadsheet cells. When education, family, or work data is stored as multiple lines in a single cell, the system should automatically split and map them to the structured fields matching Form Responses 3 format.

verification.summary: npm run build succeeds with exit code 0. No test framework configured. Two review iterations completed, all confirmed issues resolved.
